[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A stylized 3D character in a plaid outfit stands on a bright green floor near a large dark structure while dark and red blocky shapes fill the background.

Main Subject:
A person-like, animated-looking figure with long light-blonde hair and a black facial covering stands facing left, wearing a white long-sleeve top and a dark brown plaid sleeveless overlayer or dress-like garment. The character’s right hand is raised near their head in a wave-like pose, while their left arm hangs down. A black-and-white check-patterned accessory sits at the waist area, and the character wears dark gray pants. The figure also has black, glove-like hands and a small dark piece covering part of the face or nose area.

Setting:
The scene is outdoors or in a game-like open area, with a deep blue night sky overhead and scattered small light dots. The ground is a flat, bright green surface. In the background there are large, red, polygonal blocky forms and a cluster of similar red shapes, along with gray structures and a few green items at left.

Visual Details:
Lighting appears bright and evenly lit on the character, with strong contrast against the dark blue sky. The character’s hair is smooth and straight with a pale yellow-blonde tone and a small light pink accessory near the top. The raised arm and hair are angled toward the left side of the frame. A tall, thick, dark-brown vertical surface occupies the left foreground, partially blocking the view. The composition is slightly angled with the character in the lower center-right and the large red block shapes spanning most of the background.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a stylized character with long blonde hair and a plaid outfit standing on a green ground, waving one hand near their head. Large dark and red geometric shapes and gray structures fill the background under a dark blue sky.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
